_meta.note: This is a Wix-hosted site. Wix renders styles via injected inline JavaScript and obfuscated class names — CSS custom properties are not accessible via static fetch. All colour, typography, spacing, and shadow values marked '(visual estimate)' are inferred from visual inspection of the live site and Wix platform defaults. Values marked '(confirmed)' are extracted directly from HTML source or image URLs.

colors._note: No CSS custom properties (--color-*, --bg-*, etc.) were extractable due to Wix's runtime rendering. All values below are visual estimates from the live site.

background.page_body: #FFFFFF (visual estimate — white background throughout all pages)
background.hero_section: #000000 or dark overlay on photographic background (visual estimate — hero image with dark tint visible in blurred thumbnail URLs)

brand_accent.hex: UNKNOWN — insufficient visual data to confirm accent/CTA colour
brand_accent.note: The CTA button 'Request my free demo' is present on the homepage. Wix default primary button colour is often a site-defined accent; not determinable without rendering CSS.

text.heading: #1A1A1A or #000000 (visual estimate — dark, near-black headings)
text.body: #333333 or #444444 (visual estimate — standard dark grey body text)
text.links_nav: #000000 or #1A1A1A (visual estimate — navigation links appear dark)
text.links_hover: UNKNOWN — hover states not determinable from static fetch

button.primary_background: UNKNOWN (visual estimate — likely a brand accent, possibly blue or orange based on industrial/automotive sector conventions; not confirmed)
button.primary_text: #FFFFFF (visual estimate — white text on filled button is standard Wix default)
